20: class ReportsController < ApplicationController
21:   menu_item :issues
22:   before_action :find_project, :authorize, :find_issue_statuses
23: 
24:   include ReportsHelper
25:   def issue_report
26:     with_subprojects = Setting.display_subprojects_issues?
27:     @trackers = @project.rolled_up_trackers(with_subprojects).visible
28:     @versions = @project.shared_versions.sorted + [Version.new(:name => "[#{l(:label_none)}]")]
29:     @priorities = IssuePriority.all.reverse
30:     @categories = @project.issue_categories + [IssueCategory.new(:name => "[#{l(:label_none)}]")]
31:     @assignees = (Setting.issue_group_assignment? ? @project.principals : @project.users).sorted + [User.new(:firstname => "[#{l(:label_none)}]")]
32:     @authors = @project.users.sorted
33:     @subprojects = @project.descendants.visible
34:     @issues_by_tracker = Issue.by_tracker(@project, with_subprojects)
35:     @issues_by_version = Issue.by_version(@project, with_subprojects)
36:     @issues_by_priority = Issue.by_priority(@project, with_subprojects)
37:     @issues_by_category = Issue.by_category(@project, with_subprojects)
38:     @issues_by_assigned_to = Issue.by_assigned_to(@project, with_subprojects)
39:     @issues_by_author = Issue.by_author(@project, with_subprojects)
40:     @issues_by_subproject = Issue.by_subproject(@project) || []
41: 
42:     render :template => "reports/issue_report"
43:   end
44: 
45:   def issue_report_details
46:     with_subprojects = Setting.display_subprojects_issues?
47:     case params[:detail]
48:     when "tracker"
49:       @field = "tracker_id"
50:       @rows = @project.rolled_up_trackers(with_subprojects).visible
51:       @data = Issue.by_tracker(@project, with_subprojects)
52:       @report_title = l(:field_tracker)
53:     when "version"
54:       @field = "fixed_version_id"
55:       @rows = @project.shared_versions.sorted + [Version.new(:name => "[#{l(:label_none)}]")]
56:       @data = Issue.by_version(@project, with_subprojects)
57:       @report_title = l(:field_version)
58:     when "priority"
59:       @field = "priority_id"
60:       @rows = IssuePriority.all.reverse
61:       @data = Issue.by_priority(@project, with_subprojects)
62:       @report_title = l(:field_priority)
63:     when "category"
64:       @field = "category_id"
65:       @rows = @project.issue_categories + [IssueCategory.new(:name => "[#{l(:label_none)}]")]
66:       @data = Issue.by_category(@project, with_subprojects)
67:       @report_title = l(:field_category)
68:     when "assigned_to"
69:       @field = "assigned_to_id"
70:       @rows = (Setting.issue_group_assignment? ? @project.principals : @project.users).sorted + [User.new(:firstname => "[#{l(:label_none)}]")]
71:       @data = Issue.by_assigned_to(@project, with_subprojects)
72:       @report_title = l(:field_assigned_to)
73:     when "author"
74:       @field = "author_id"
75:       @rows = @project.users.sorted
76:       @data = Issue.by_author(@project, with_subprojects)
77:       @report_title = l(:field_author)
78:     when "subproject"
79:       @field = "project_id"
80:       @rows = @project.descendants.visible
81:       @data = Issue.by_subproject(@project) || []
82:       @report_title = l(:field_subproject)
83:     else
84:       render_404
85:     end
86:     respond_to do |format|
87:       format.html
88:       format.csv do
89:         send_data(issue_report_details_to_csv(@field, @statuses, @rows, @data),
90:                   :type => 'text/csv; header=present',
91:                   :filename => "report-#{params[:detail]}.csv")
92:       end
93:     end
94:   end
95: 
96:   private
97: 
98:   def find_issue_statuses
99:     @statuses = @project.rolled_up_statuses.sorted.to_a
100:   end
101: end

18: # Foundation, Inc., 51 Franklin Street, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA  02110-1301, USA.
19: 
20: class SearchController < ApplicationController
21:   before_action :find_optional_project_by_id, :authorize_global
22:   accept_api_auth :index
23: 
24:   def index
25:     @question = params[:q]&.strip || ""
26:     @all_words = params[:all_words] ? params[:all_words].present? : true
27:     @titles_only = params[:titles_only] ? params[:titles_only].present? : false
28:     @search_attachments = params[:attachments].presence || '0'
29:     @open_issues = params[:open_issues] ? params[:open_issues].present? : false
30: 
31:     case params[:format]
32:     when 'xml', 'json'
33:       @offset, @limit = api_offset_and_limit
34:     else
35:       @offset = nil
36:       @limit = Setting.search_results_per_page.to_i
37:       @limit = 10 if @limit == 0
38:     end
39: 
40:     # quick jump to an issue
41:     if !api_request? && (m = @question.match(/^#?(\d+)$/)) && (issue = Issue.visible.find_by_id(m[1].to_i))
42:       redirect_to issue_path(issue)
43:       return
44:     end
45: 
46:     projects_to_search =
47:       case params[:scope]
48:       when 'all'
49:         nil
50:       when 'my_projects'
51:         User.current.projects
52:       when 'bookmarks'
53:         Project.where(id: User.current.bookmarked_project_ids)
54:       when 'subprojects'
55:         @project ? (@project.self_and_descendants.to_a) : nil
56:       else
57:         @project
58:       end
59: 
60:     @object_types = Redmine::Search.available_search_types.dup
61:     if projects_to_search.is_a? Project
62:       # don't search projects
63:       @object_types.delete('projects')
64:       # only show what the user is allowed to view
65:       @object_types = @object_types.select {|o| User.current.allowed_to?(:"view_#{o}", projects_to_search)}
66:     end
67: 
68:     @scope = @object_types.select {|t| params[t].present?}
69:     @scope = @object_types if @scope.empty?
70: 
71:     fetcher = Redmine::Search::Fetcher.new(
72:       @question, User.current, @scope, projects_to_search,
73:       :all_words => @all_words, :titles_only => @titles_only, :attachments => @search_attachments, :open_issues => @open_issues,
74:       :cache => params[:page].present?, :params => params.to_unsafe_hash
75:     )
76: 
77:     if fetcher.tokens.present?
78:       @result_count = fetcher.result_count
79:       @result_count_by_type = fetcher.result_count_by_type
80:       @tokens = fetcher.tokens
81: 
82:       @result_pages = Paginator.new @result_count, @limit, params['page']
83:       @offset ||= @result_pages.offset
84:       @results = fetcher.results(@offset, @result_pages.per_page)
85:     else
86:       @question = ""
87:     end
88:     respond_to do |format|
89:       format.html {render :layout => false if request.xhr?}
90:       format.api do
91:         @results ||= []
92:         render :layout => false
93:       end
94:     end
95:   end
96: end

17: # along with this program; if not, write to the Free Software
18: # Foundation, Inc., 51 Franklin Street, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA  02110-1301, USA.
19: 
20: class AutoCompletesController < ApplicationController
21:   before_action :find_project
22: 
23:   def issues
24:     issues = []
25:     q = (params[:q] || params[:term]).to_s.strip
26:     status = params[:status].to_s
27:     issue_id = params[:issue_id].to_s
28: 
29:     scope = Issue.cross_project_scope(@project, params[:scope]).includes(:tracker).visible
30:     scope = scope.open(status == 'o') if status.present?
31:     scope = scope.where.not(:id => issue_id.to_i) if issue_id.present?
32:     if q.present?
33:       if q =~ /\A#?(\d+)\z/
34:         issues << scope.find_by(:id => $1.to_i)
35:       end
36:       issues += scope.like(q).order(:id => :desc).limit(10).to_a
37:       issues.compact!
38:     else
39:       issues += scope.order(:id => :desc).limit(10).to_a
40:     end
41: 
42:     render :json => format_issues_json(issues)
43:   end
44: 
45:   def wiki_pages
46:     q = params[:q].to_s.strip
47:     wiki = Wiki.find_by(project: @project)
48:     if wiki.nil? || !User.current.allowed_to?(:view_wiki_pages, @project)
49:       render json: []
50:       return
51:     end
52: 
53:     scope = wiki.pages.reorder(id: :desc)
54:     wiki_pages =
55:       if q.present?
56:         scope.where("LOWER(#{WikiPage.table_name}.title) LIKE LOWER(?)", "%#{q}%").limit(10).to_a
57:       else
58:         scope.limit(10).to_a
59:       end
60:     render json: format_wiki_pages_json(wiki_pages)
61:   end
62: 
63:   private
64: 
65:   def find_project
66:     if params[:project_id].present?
67:       @project = Project.find(params[:project_id])
68:     end
69:   rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
70:     render_404
71:   end
72: 
73:   def format_issues_json(issues)
74:     issues.map do |issue|
75:       {
76:         'id' => issue.id,
77:         'label' => "#{issue.tracker} ##{issue.id}: #{issue.subject.to_s.truncate(255)}",
78:         'value' => issue.id
79:       }
80:     end
81:   end
82: 
83:   def format_wiki_pages_json(wiki_pages)
84:     wiki_pages.map do |wiki_page|
85:       {
86:         'id' => wiki_page.id,
87:         'label' => wiki_page.title.to_s.truncate(255),
88:         'value' => wiki_page.title
89:       }
90:     end
91:   end
92: end

18: # Foundation, Inc., 51 Franklin Street, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA  02110-1301, USA.
19: 
20: class ContextMenusController < ApplicationController
21:   helper :watchers
22:   helper :issues
23: 
24:   before_action :find_issues, :only => :issues
25:   before_action :require_admin, :only => [:projects, :users]
26: 
27:   def issues
28:     if @issues.size == 1
29:       @issue = @issues.first
30:     end
31:     @issue_ids = @issues.map(&:id).sort
32: 
33:     @allowed_statuses = @issues.map(&:new_statuses_allowed_to).reduce(:&)
34: 
35:     @can = {
36:       :edit => @issues.all?(&:attributes_editable?),
37:       :log_time => @issue&.time_loggable?,
38:       :copy => User.current.allowed_to?(:copy_issues, @projects) && Issue.allowed_target_projects.any?,
39:       :add_watchers => User.current.allowed_to?(:add_issue_watchers, @projects),
40:       :delete => @issues.all?(&:deletable?),
41:       :add_subtask => @issue && !@issue.closed? && User.current.allowed_to?(:manage_subtasks, @project)
42:     }
43: 
44:     @assignables = @issues.map(&:assignable_users).reduce(:&)
45:     @trackers = @projects.map {|p| Issue.allowed_target_trackers(p)}.reduce(:&)
46:     @versions = @projects.map {|p| p.shared_versions.open}.reduce(:&)
47: 
48:     @priorities = IssuePriority.active.reverse
49:     @back = back_url
50:     begin
51:       # Recognize the controller and action from the back_url to determine
52:       # which view triggered the context menu.
53:       if relative_url_root.present? && back_url&.starts_with?(relative_url_root)
54:         normalized_back_url = back_url.delete_prefix(relative_url_root)
55:       else
56:         normalized_back_url = back_url
57:       end
58:       route = Rails.application.routes.recognize_path(normalized_back_url)
59:       @include_delete =
60:         [
61:           {controller: 'issues', action: 'index'},
62:           {controller: 'gantts', action: 'show'},
63:           {controller: 'calendars', action: 'show'}
64:         ].any?(route.slice(:controller, :action))
65:     rescue ActionController::RoutingError
66:       @include_delete = false
67:     end
68: 
69:     @columns = params[:c]
70: 
71:     @options_by_custom_field = {}
72:     if @can[:edit]
73:       custom_fields = @issues.map(&:editable_custom_fields).reduce(:&).reject(&:multiple?).select {|field| field.format.bulk_edit_supported}
74:       custom_fields.each do |field|
75:         values = field.possible_values_options(@projects)
76:         if values.present?
77:           @options_by_custom_field[field] = values
78:         end
79:       end
80:     end
81: 
82:     @safe_attributes = @issues.map(&:safe_attribute_names).reduce(:&)
83:     render :layout => false
84:   end
85: 
86:   def time_entries
87:     @time_entries = TimeEntry.where(:id => params[:ids]).
88:       preload(:project => :time_entry_activities).
89:       preload(:user).to_a
90: 
91:     if @time_entries.blank? || !@time_entries.all?(&:visible?)
92:       render_404;
93:       return
94:     end
95: 
96:     if @time_entries.size == 1
97:       @time_entry = @time_entries.first
98:     end
99: 
100:     @projects = @time_entries.filter_map(&:project).uniq
101:     @project = @projects.first if @projects.size == 1
102:     @activities = @projects.map(&:activities).reduce(:&)
103: 
104:     edit_allowed = @time_entries.all? {|t| t.editable_by?(User.current)}
105:     @can = {:edit => edit_allowed, :delete => edit_allowed}
106:     @back = back_url
107: 
108:     @options_by_custom_field = {}
109:     if @can[:edit]
110:       custom_fields = @time_entries.map(&:editable_custom_fields).reduce(:&).reject(&:multiple?).select {|field| field.format.bulk_edit_supported}
111:       custom_fields.each do |field|
112:         values = field.possible_values_options(@projects)
113:         if values.present?
114:           @options_by_custom_field[field] = values
115:         end
116:       end
117:     end
118: 
119:     render :layout => false
120:   end
121: 
122:   def projects
123:     @projects = Project.where(id: params[:ids]).to_a
124:     if @projects.empty?
125:       render_404
126:       return
127:     end
128: 
129:     if @projects.size == 1
130:       @project = @projects.first
131:     end
132:     render layout: false
133:   end
134: 
135:   def users
136:     @users = User.where(id: params[:ids]).to_a
137: 
138:     (render_404; return) unless @users.present?
139:     if @users.size == 1
140:       @user = @users.first
141:     end
142: 
143:     @groups = Group.givable.sorted.to_a
144:     @common_group_ids = Group.givable.joins(:groups_users).where(groups_users: { user_id: @users.map(&:id) }).distinct.pluck(:id).to_set
145:     @back = back_url
146: 
147:     render layout: false
148:   end
149: end

20: class IssueRelationsController < ApplicationController
21:   helper :issues
22: 
23:   before_action :find_issue, :authorize, :only => [:index, :create]
24:   before_action :find_relation, :only => [:show, :destroy]
25: 
26:   accept_api_auth :index, :show, :create, :destroy
27: 
28:   def index
29:     @relations = @issue.relations
30: 
31:     respond_to do |format|
32:       format.html {head :ok}
33:       format.api
34:     end
35:   end
36: 
37:   def show
38:     raise Unauthorized unless @relation.visible?
39: 
40:     respond_to do |format|
41:       format.html {head :ok}
42:       format.api
43:     end
44:   end
45: 
46:   def create
47:     saved = false
48:     params_relation = params[:relation]
49:     unsaved_relations = []
50: 
51:     relation_issues_to_id.each do |issue_to_id|
52:       params_relation[:issue_to_id] = issue_to_id
53: 
54:       @relation = IssueRelation.new
55:       @relation.issue_from = @issue

64:

115:   def relation_issues_to_id
116:     issue_to_id = params[:relation].require(:issue_to_id)
117:     case issue_to_id
118:     when String
119:       issue_to_id = issue_to_id.split(',').reject(&:blank?)
120:     when Integer
121:       issue_to_id = [issue_to_id]
122:     end
123:     issue_to_id
124:   rescue ActionController::ParameterMissing => e
125:     # We return a empty array just to loop once and return a validation error
126:     # ToDo: Find a better method to return an error if the param is missing.
127:     ['']
128:   end
129: 
130:   def select_relations(issue)
131:     issue.reload.relations.select {|r| r.other_issue(issue) && r.other_issue(issue).visible?}
132:   end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2:

18: # Foundation, Inc., 51 Franklin Street, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA  02110-1301, USA.
19: 
20: class WatchersController < ApplicationController
21:   before_action :require_login, :find_watchables, :only => [:watch, :unwatch]
22: 
23:   def watch
24:     set_watcher(@watchables, User.current, true)
25:   end
26: 
27:   def unwatch
28:     set_watcher(@watchables, User.current, false)
29:   end
30: 
31:   before_action :find_project, :authorize, :only => [:new, :create, :append, :destroy, :autocomplete_for_user, :autocomplete_for_mention]
32:   accept_api_auth :create, :destroy
33: 
34:   def new
35:     respond_to do |format|
36:       format.html { render_404 }
37:       format.js do
38:         @users = users_for_new_watcher
39:       end
40:     end
41:   end
42: 
43:   def create
44:     return unless authorize_for_watchable_type(:add)
45: 
46:     user_ids = []
47:     if params[:watcher]
48:       user_ids << (params[:watcher][:user_ids] || params[:watcher][:user_id])
49:     else
50:       user_ids << params[:user_id]
51:     end
52:     user_ids = user_ids.flatten.compact.uniq
53:     users = Principal.assignable_watchers.where(:id => user_ids).to_a
54:     users.each do |user|
55:       @watchables.each do |watchable|
56:         if watchable.valid_watcher?(user)
57:           Watcher.create(:watchable => watchable, :user => user)
58:         end
59:       end
60:     end
61:     respond_to do |format|
62:       format.html do
63:         redirect_to_referer_or do
64:           render(:html => 'Watcher added.', :status => :ok, :layout => true)
65:         end
66:       end
67:       format.js  {@users = users_for_new_watcher}
68:       format.api {render_api_ok}
69:     end
70:   end
71: 
72:   def append
73:     if params[:watcher]
74:       user_ids = params[:watcher][:user_ids] || [params[:watcher][:user_id]]
75:       @users = Principal.assignable_watchers.where(:id => user_ids).to_a
76:     end
77:     if @users.blank?
78:       head :ok
79:     end
80:   end
81: 
82:   def destroy
83:     return unless authorize_for_watchable_type(:delete)
84: 
85:     user = Principal.find(params[:user_id])
86:     @watchables.each do |watchable|
87:       watchable.set_watcher(user, false)
88:     end
89:     respond_to do |format|
90:       format.html do
91:         redirect_to_referer_or do
92:           render(:html => 'Watcher removed.', :status => :ok, :layout => true)
93:         end
94:       end
95:       format.js
96:       format.api {render_api_ok}
97:     end
98:   rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
99:     render_404
100:   end
101: 
102:   def autocomplete_for_user
103:     @users = users_for_new_watcher
104:     render :layout => false
105:   end
106: 
107:   def autocomplete_for_mention
108:     users = users_for_mention
109:     render :json => format_users_json(users)
110:   end
111: 
112:   private
113: 
114:   def find_project
115:     if params[:object_type] && params[:object_id]
116:       @watchables = find_objects_from_params
117:       @projects = @watchables.map(&:project).uniq
118:       if @projects.size == 1
119:         @project = @projects.first
120:       end
121:     elsif params[:project_id]
122:       @project = Project.visible.find_by_param(params[:project_id])
123:     end
124:   end
125: 
126:   def find_watchables
127:     @watchables = find_objects_from_params
128:     unless @watchables.present?
129:       render_404
130:     end
131:   end
132: 
133:   def set_watcher(watchables, user, watching)
134:     watchables.each do |watchable|
135:       watchable.set_watcher(user, watching)
136:     end
137:     respond_to do |format|
138:       format.html do
139:         text = watching ? 'Watcher added.' : 'Watcher removed.'
140:         redirect_to_referer_or do
141:           render(:html => text, :status => :ok, :layout => true)
142:         end
143:       end
144:       format.js do
145:         render(:partial => 'set_watcher',
146:                :locals => {:user => user, :watched => watchables})
147:       end
148:     end
149:   end
150: 
151:   def users_for_new_watcher
152:     scope = nil
153:     if params[:q].blank?
154:       if @project.present?
155:         scope = @project.principals.assignable_watchers
156:       elsif @projects.present? && @projects.size > 1
157:         scope = Principal.joins(:members).where(:members => { :project_id => @projects }).assignable_watchers.distinct
158:       end
159:     else
160:       scope = Principal.assignable_watchers.limit(100)
161:     end
162:     users = scope.sorted.like(params[:q]).to_a
163:     if @watchables && @watchables.size == 1
164:       watchable_object = @watchables.first
165:       users -= watchable_object.visible_watcher_users
166:     end
167:     @watchables&.each do |watchable|
168:       users.reject!{|user| !watchable.valid_watcher?(user)}
169:     end
170:     users
171:   end
172: 
173:   def users_for_mention
174:     users = []
175:     q = params[:q].to_s.strip
176: 
177:     scope = nil
178:     if params[:q].blank? && @project.present?
179:       scope = @project.principals.assignable_watchers
180:     else
181:       scope = Principal.assignable_watchers.limit(10)
182:     end
183:     # Exclude Group principal for now
184:     scope = scope.where(:type => ['User'])
185: 
186:     users = scope.sorted.like(params[:q]).to_a
187: 
188:     if @watchables && @watchables.size == 1
189:       object = @watchables.first
190:       if object.respond_to?(:visible?)
191:         users.reject! {|user| user.is_a?(User) && !object.visible?(user)}
192:       end
193:     end
194: 
195:     users
196:   end
197: 
198:   def format_users_json(users)
199:     users.map do |user|
200:       {
201:         'firstname' => user.firstname,
202:         'lastname' => user.lastname,
203:         'name' => user.name,
204:         'login' => user.login
205:       }
206:     end
207:   end
208: 
209:   def find_objects_from_params
210:     klass =
211:       begin
212:         Object.const_get(params[:object_type].camelcase)
213:       rescue
214:         nil
215:       end
216:     return unless klass && Class === klass # rubocop:disable Style/CaseEquality
217:     return unless klass < ApplicationRecord
218:     return unless klass < Redmine::Acts::Watchable::InstanceMethods
219: 
220:     scope = klass.where(:id => Array.wrap(params[:object_id])).order(:id)
221:     if klass.reflect_on_association(:project)
222:       scope = scope.preload(:project => :enabled_modules)
223:     end
224:     objects = scope.to_a
225: 
226:     raise Unauthorized if objects.any? do |w|
227:       if w.respond_to?(:visible?)
228:         !w.visible?
229:       elsif w.respond_to?(:project) && w.project
230:         !w.project.visible?
231:       end
232:     end
233: 
234:     objects
235:   end
236: 
237:   # Check permission for the watchable type for each watchable involved
238:   def authorize_for_watchable_type(action)
239:     if @watchables.any?{|watchable| !User.current.allowed_to?(:"#{action}_#{watchable.class.name.underscore}_watchers", watchable.project)}
240:       render_403
241:       return false
242:     else
243:       return true
244:     end
245:   end
246: end

445:     if (custom = attributes[:custom_field_values])

20: module Redmine
21:   module Helpers
22:     # Simple class to compute the start and end dates of a calendar
23:     class Calendar
24:       include Redmine::I18n
25:       include Redmine::Utils::DateCalculation
26: 
27:       attr_reader :startdt, :enddt
28: 
29:       def initialize(date, lang = current_language, period = :month)
30:         @date = date
31:         @events = []
32:         @ending_events_by_days = {}
33:         @starting_events_by_days = {}
34:         set_language_if_valid lang
35:         case period
36:         when :month
37:           @startdt = Date.civil(date.year, date.month, 1)
38:           @enddt = (@startdt >> 1)-1
39:           # starts from the first day of the week
40:           @startdt = @startdt - (@startdt.cwday - first_wday)%7
41:           # ends on the last day of the week
42:           @enddt = @enddt + (last_wday - @enddt.cwday)%7
43:         when :week
44:           @startdt = date - (date.cwday - first_wday)%7
45:           @enddt = date + (last_wday - date.cwday)%7
46:         else
47:           raise 'Invalid period'
48:         end
49:       end
50: 
51:       def format_month
52:         (@startdt..@enddt).to_a
53:       end
54: 
55:       def week_number(day)
56:         (day + (11 - day.cwday) % 7).cweek
57:       end
58: 
59:       def day_css_classes(day)
60:         css = day.month==month ? +'this-month' : +'other-month'
61:         css << " today" if User.current.today == day
62:         css << " nwday" if non_working_week_days.include?(day.cwday)
63:         css
64:       end
65: 
66:       # Sets calendar events
67:       def events=(events)
68:         @events = events
69:         @ending_events_by_days = @events.group_by {|event| event.due_date}
70:         @starting_events_by_days = @events.group_by {|event| event.start_date}
71:       end
72: 
73:       # Returns events for the given day
74:       def events_on(day)
75:         ((@ending_events_by_days[day] || []) + (@starting_events_by_days[day] || [])).uniq
76:       end
77: 
78:       # Calendar current month
79:       def month
80:         @date.month
81:       end
82: 
83:       # Return the first day of week
84:       # 1 = Monday ... 7 = Sunday
85:       def first_wday
86:         @first_wday ||= begin
87:           start_of_week = Setting.start_of_week.to_i
88:           case start_of_week
89:           when 1, 6, 7
90:             ((start_of_week - 1) % 7) + 1
91:           else
92:             ((l(:general_first_day_of_week).to_i - 1) % 7) + 1
93:           end
94:         end
95:       end
96: 
97:       def last_wday
98:         @last_wday ||= ((first_wday + 5) % 7) + 1
99:       end
100:     end
101:   end
102: end

19: 
20: module Redmine
21:   module Helpers
22:     class TimeReport
23:       attr_reader :criteria, :columns, :hours, :total_hours, :periods
24: 
25:       def initialize(project, criteria, columns, time_entry_scope)
26:         @project = project
27: 
28:         @criteria = criteria || []
29:         @criteria = @criteria.select{|criteria| available_criteria.has_key? criteria}
30:         @criteria.uniq!
31:         @criteria = @criteria[0, 3]
32: 
33:         @columns = (columns && %w(year month week day).include?(columns)) ? columns : 'month'
34:         @scope = time_entry_scope
35: 
36:         run
37:       end
38: 
39:       def available_criteria
40:         @available_criteria || load_available_criteria
41:       end
42: 
43:       private
44: 
45:       def run
46:         unless @criteria.empty?
47:           time_columns = %w(tyear tmonth tweek spent_on)
48:           @hours = []
49:           @scope.includes(:activity).
50:               reorder(nil).
51:               group(@criteria.collect{|criteria| @available_criteria[criteria][:sql]} + time_columns).
52:               joins(@criteria.filter_map{|criteria| @available_criteria[criteria][:joins]}).
53:               sum(:hours).each do |hash, hours|
54:             h = {'hours' => hours}
55:             (@criteria + time_columns).each_with_index do |name, i|
56:               h[name] = hash[i]
57:             end
58:             @hours << h
59:           end
60: 
61:           @hours.each do |row|
62:             case @columns
63:             when 'year'
64:               row['year'] = row['tyear']
65:             when 'month'
66:               row['month'] = "#{row['tyear']}-#{row['tmonth']}"
67:             when 'week'
68:               row['week'] = "#{row['spent_on'].cwyear}-#{row['tweek']}"
69:             when 'day'
70:               row['day'] = "#{row['spent_on']}"
71:             end
72:           end
73: 
74:           min = @hours.pluck('spent_on').min
75:           @from = min ? min.to_date : User.current.today
76: 
77:           max = @hours.pluck('spent_on').max
78:           @to = max ? max.to_date : User.current.today
79: 
80:           @total_hours = @hours.inject(0) {|s, k| s = s + k['hours'].to_f}
81: 
82:           @periods = []
83:           # Date#at_beginning_of_ not supported in Rails 1.2.x
84:           date_from = @from.to_time
85:           # 100 columns max
86:           while date_from <= @to.to_time && @periods.length < 100
87:             case @columns
88:             when 'year'
89:               @periods << "#{date_from.year}"
90:               date_from = (date_from + 1.year).at_beginning_of_year
91:             when 'month'
92:               @periods << "#{date_from.year}-#{date_from.month}"
93:               date_from = (date_from + 1.month).at_beginning_of_month
94:             when 'week'
95:               @periods << "#{date_from.to_date.cwyear}-#{date_from.to_date.cweek}"
96:               date_from = (date_from + 7.day).at_beginning_of_week
97:             when 'day'
98:               @periods << "#{date_from.to_date}"
99:               date_from = date_from + 1.day
100:             end
101:           end
102:         end
103:       end
104: 
105:       def load_available_criteria
106:         @available_criteria = {
107:           'project' => {:sql => "#{TimeEntry.table_name}.project_id",
108:                         :klass => Project,
109:                         :label => :label_project},
110:           'status' => {:sql => "#{Issue.table_name}.status_id",
111:                        :klass => IssueStatus,
112:                        :label => :field_status},
113:           'version' => {:sql => "#{Issue.table_name}.fixed_version_id",
114:                         :klass => ::Version,
115:                         :label => :label_version},
116:           'category' => {:sql => "#{Issue.table_name}.category_id",
117:                          :klass => IssueCategory,
118:                          :label => :field_category},

38:       def cache_store

69:         ret = Hash.new {|h, k| h[k] = 0}
70:         result_ids.group_by(&:first).each do |scope, ids|
71:           ret[scope] += ids.size
72:         end
73:         ret

76:       # Returns the results for the given offset and limit
77:       def results(offset, limit)
78:         result_ids_to_load = result_ids[offset, limit] || []
79:         results_by_scope = Hash.new {|h, k| h[k] = []}
80:         result_ids_to_load.group_by(&:first).each do |scope, scope_and_ids|
81:           klass = scope.singularize.camelcase.constantize
82:           results_by_scope[scope] += klass.search_results_from_ids(scope_and_ids.map(&:last))
83:         end
84:         result_ids_to_load.filter_map do |scope, id|
85:           results_by_scope[scope].detect {|record| record.id == id}
86:         end

102:           cache_key = ActiveSupport::Cache.expand_cache_key(
103:             [@question, @user.id, @scope.sort, @options, project_ids.sort]
104:           )
105:           Redmine::Search.cache_store.fetch(cache_key, :force => !@cache) do
106:             load_result_ids
107:           end
108:         else
109:           load_result_ids
110:         end
111:       end

113:       def load_result_ids
114:         ret = []
115:         # get all the results ranks and ids
116:         @scope.each do |scope|
117:           klass = scope.singularize.camelcase.constantize
118:           ranks_and_ids_in_scope = klass.search_result_ranks_and_ids(@tokens, User.current, @projects, @options)
119:           ret += ranks_and_ids_in_scope.map {|rs| [scope, rs]}
120:         end
121:         # sort results, higher rank and id first
122:         ret.sort! {|a, b| b.last <=> a.last}
123:         # only keep ids now that results are sorted
124:         ret.map! {|scope, r| [scope, r.last]}
125:         ret

134:       def tokens
135:         # extract tokens from the question
136:         # eg. hello "bye bye" => ["hello", "bye bye"]
137:         tokens = @question.scan(/"[^"]+"|[^\p{Zs}]+/).map do |token|
138:           # Remove quotes from quoted tokens, strip surrounding whitespace
139:           # e.g. "\" foo bar \"" => "foo bar"
140:           token.gsub(/\A"\p{Zs}*|\p{Zs}*"\Z/, '')
141:         end
142:         # tokens must be at least 2 characters long
143:         # but for Chinese characters (Chinese HANZI/Japanese KANJI), tokens can be one character
144:         # no more than 5 tokens to search for
145:         tokens.uniq.select{|w| w.length > 1 || w =~ /\p{Han}/}.first 5
146:       end

20: module Redmine
21:   module Activity
22:     # Class used to retrieve activity events
23:     class Fetcher
24:       attr_reader :user, :project, :scope
25: 
26:       def initialize(user, options={})
27:         options.assert_valid_keys(:project, :with_subprojects, :author)
28:         @user = user
29:         @project = options[:project]
30:         @options = options
31: 
32:         @scope = event_types
33:       end
34: 
35:       # Returns an array of available event types
36:       def event_types
37:         return @event_types unless @event_types.nil?
38: 
39:         @event_types = Redmine::Activity.available_event_types
40:         if @project
41:           projects = @project.self_and_descendants
42:           @event_types = @event_types.select do |event_type|
43:             keep = false
44:             constantized_providers(event_type).each do |provider|
45:               options = provider.activity_provider_options[event_type]
46:               permission = options[:permission]
47:               unless options.key?(:permission)
48:                 permission ||= :"view_#{event_type}"
49:               end
50:               if permission
51:                 keep |= projects.any? {|p| @user.allowed_to?(permission, p)}
52:               else
53:                 keep = true
54:               end
55:             end
56:             keep
57:           end
58:         end
59:         @event_types
60:       end
61: 
62:       # Yields to filter the activity scope
63:       def scope_select(&)
64:         @scope = @scope.select {|t| yield t}
65:       end
66: 
67:       # Sets the scope
68:       # Argument can be :all, :default or an array of event types
69:       def scope=(s)
70:         case s
71:         when :all
72:           @scope = event_types
73:         when :default
74:           default_scope!
75:         else
76:           @scope = s & event_types
77:         end
78:       end
79: 
80:       # Resets the scope to the default scope
81:       def default_scope!
82:         @scope = Redmine::Activity.default_event_types
83:       end
84: 
85:       # Returns an array of events for the given date range
86:       # sorted in reverse chronological order
87:       def events(from = nil, to = nil, options={})
88:         e = []
89:         @options[:limit] = options[:limit]
90:         @options[:last_by_project] = options[:last_by_project] if options[:last_by_project]
91: 
92:         @scope.each do |event_type|
93:           constantized_providers(event_type).each do |provider|
94:             e += provider.find_events(event_type, @user, from, to, @options)
95:           end
96:         end
97: 
98:         if options[:last_by_project]
99:           e.sort!
100:         else
101:           e.sort! {|a, b| b.event_datetime <=> a.event_datetime}
102: 
103:           if options[:limit]
104:             e = e.slice(0, options[:limit])
105:           end
106:         end
107:         e
108:       end
109: 
110:       private
111: 
112:       def constantized_providers(event_type)
113:         Redmine::Activity.providers[event_type].map(&:constantize)
114:       end
115:     end
116:   end

        "Issue is both a container (attachments, watchers, custom values, reactions, journals) and a tree node (nested set).",
        "Many teardown paths are owned by acts_as_* plugins (attachable, customizable, watchable) and nested_set, not by the Issue model itself.",
        "Journal creation is explicit in create_journal after_save; it depends on current_journal initialized by controllers/services.",
        "Time entries are destroyed with the issue (dependent: :destroy) but bulk delete/destroy offers nullify/reassign (issues_controller.rb:431-480).",
        "Relations are deleted via IssueRelation callbacks and parent/child rollups run in after_save/after_destroy."
      ]
